en.text: shall they be broken to shivers
I will write upon him my
; of the Laodiceans: or, in Laodicea
. A measure: the word choenix signifieth a measure containing one wine quart, and the twelfth part of a quart
. offer: or, add it to the prayers
. Apollyon: that is to say, A destroyer
. for an hour: or, at an hour
. I will give: or, I will give unto my two witnesses that they may prophesy
. of men: Gr. names of men
. destroy the earth: or, corrupt the earth
to be carried away of the flood
. to continue: or, to make war
: to receive: Gr. to give them
is Six hundred threescore and six
. from henceforth: or, from henceforth saith the Spirit, Yea
them that had gotten the victory
from the things which are written
. out of the book: or, from the tree of life
